question: Found a bug?
answer: Sorry for the inconveince, pls reach out via X (formerly know as Twitter) @ProWrestleKnow for any bugs you may have encountered

question: When is data updated?
answer: Data is typically updated every one to two weeks, on Sunday 11:59 pm EST, (subject to change). It was last updated on June 8, 2024.

question: Will more charts/graphs/imagines be added in the future
answer: Yes, though it may take some time; we aim to add an assortment of additional charts, graphs, and imagines in the future

question: What types of charts/graphs/imagines will be added?
answer: A vareity of charts and graphs are planned to be added, including a multitude of interactive graphs, from Timelines, StoryBoards, Ratings, Idea Wheels, Venn Diagrams, T-Charts, Spider-Chart

question: What will the compare page do?
answer: A user will be able to compare two wrestlers, titles, companies, teams, brand, or ppvs in table view

question: What games will the game page hold
answer: The game spage will hold an assortment of wrestling themed games, with the current plan to roll out 2 games in the near future, those games being Damien and Kairi's Ship Sails. Damien, the classic Snake game, named after Jake Roberts snake, Damien. Kairi's Ship Sails, the card game originally named My Ship Sails, named after Kairi Sane. These are the 2 games that will be initally rolled out. 4 additional games are also being considered for potential development, Pac, Chasing the Dragon, Wrestle Economy, Ring Breaker. Pac being an adaption of the classic Pac Man using the Bastard Pac. Chasing the Dragon will be a classic Super Mario Bros styled game, following the carrer of Bryan Danielson (Daniel Bryan). Wrestle Economy and Ring Breaker plans are TBC. The releases of these games are to be confirmed.
